question_text: Let (0, 1) (1 , 2) (3, 4)= union union S and T = {0, 1, 2, 3} . Then which of the following statements is(are)true?
question_text_latex: Let (0, 1) (1 , 2) (3, 4)= union union S and T = {0, 1, 2, 3} . Then which of the following statements is(are)true?

options.label: A
options.text: There are infinitely many functions from S to T There are infinitely many elements in domain and four elements in co-domain. ⇒ There are infinitely many functions from S to T. ⇒ Option (A) is correct

options.label: B
options.text: There are infinitely many strictly increasing functions from S to T If number of elements in domain is greater than number of elements in co- domain, then number of strictly increasing function is zero. ⇒ Option (B) is incorrect

options.label: C
options.text: The number of continuous functions from S to T is at most 120 Maximum number of continuous functions = 4 4 4 = 64*(Every subset (0, 1), (1, 2), (3, 4) has four choices)64 < 120 ⇒ option (C) is correct.

options.label: D
options.text: Every continuous function from S to T is differentiable Answer (A, C, D) Sol. (0, 1) (1 , 2) (3, 4)= union union S and T = {0, 1, 2, 3}. Let domain and co-domain of a function y = f(x) are S and T respectively. For every point at which f(x)is continuous, f′(x) = 0 ⇒ Every continuous function from S to T is differentiable. solution_explanation: 2 kg m−3, pressure 𝑃𝑎 and temperature 𝑇𝑎 = 300 K enters the furnace . Assume air as an ideal gas, neglect the variations in 𝜌 and 𝑇 inside the chimney and the furnace. Also ignore the viscous effects. [Given: The acceleration due to gravity 𝑔 = 10 m s−2 and 𝜋 = 3.14] Q.16 Considering the air flow to be streamline, the steady mass flow rate of air exiting the chimney is _______ gm s−1. JEE (Advanced) 2023 Paper 2 12/12 PARAGRAPH II A cylindrical furnace has height ( 𝐻) and diameter (𝐷) both 1 m. It is maintained at temperature 360 K. The air gets heated inside the furnace at constant pressure 𝑃𝑎 and its temperature becomes 𝑇 = 360 𝐾. The hot air with density 𝜌 rises up a vertical chimney of diameter 𝑑 = 0.1 m and height ℎ = 9 m above the furnace and exits the chimney (see the figure). As a result, atmospheric air of density 𝜌𝑎 = 2 kg m−3, pressure 𝑃𝑎 and temperature 𝑇𝑎 = 300 K enters the furnace. Assume air as an ideal gas, neglect the variations in 𝜌 and 𝑇 inside the chimney and the furnace. Also ignore the viscous effects. [Given: The acceleration due to gravity 𝑔 = 10 m s−2 and 𝜋 = 3.14] Q.17 When the chimney is closed using a cap at the top, a pressure difference Δ𝑃 develops between the top and the bottom surfaces of the cap. If the changes in the temperature and density of the hot air, due to the stoppage of air flow, are negligible then the value of Δ𝑃 is ______ N m−2. END OF THE QUESTION PAPER JEE (Advanced) 2023 Paper 2 1/10 Q.1 The correct molecular orbital diagram for F2 molecule in the ground state is (A) (B) (C) (D)
